title: Pride in Place Programme: Phase 1 place selection methodology note
body: "This note sets out the methodology used to select places for phase 1 of the Pride in Place programme.  The place selection methodology was developed and carried out under the previous Conservative government, originally named the Long-Term Plan for Towns (LTPT).  The 75 phase 1 places were selected in two parts. An initial 55 places in ‘Part A’ in October 2023, followed by a further 20 places in ‘Part B’ in March 2024. "
